title: Personal DNA
content:
After about 25-30 minutes of "sliding" along the survey, I've got "my Personal DNA":http://www.personaldna.com/report.php?k=thMfkwRgLmLlDgX-MG-ADCDD-f31a.

bq.. Your attention to detail, confidence, sense of order, and focus on functionality combine to make you an ANALYST.

You are very curious about how things work, delving into the mechanics behind things.

"A lot more ...":http://www.personaldna.com/report.php?k=thMfkwRgLmLlDgX-MG-ADCDD-f31a

p. Quite impressive indeed. (The program, not me.) Well, except this one.

bq. You have a strong sense of style and value your personal presentation - friends may even seek your style advice from time to time.

Nahhhh .. I might misread one of the question. :P
